subcodes.first_line: O leaf of certitude and tranquility! At all times thou dwellest in the Sacred Precinct, in the gathering of the handmaidens of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه مطمئنه در کل احیان در بقعه مبارکه در محفل اماء الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
